title: View API request logs
excerpt: Filter API request logs and view log entries in the Developers Dashboard. > [Workbench](https://docs.stripe.com/workbench.md) replaces the Developers Dashboard, and we automatically enable it for all new Stripe accounts by default. Configure this setting from the [Developers](https://dashboard.stripe.com/settings/developers) settings in the Dashboard. > Read about how to [view API request logs](https://docs.stripe.com/workbench/overview.md#request-logs) in Workbench. > Use [Workbench](https://docs.stripe.com/workbench/overview.md#request-logs) to view v2 API request logs, which don’t appear in the Developers Dashboard. When you send an API request, Stripe creates an object and logs the request for your account.…
